feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Hybrid LOB: INSERT/UPSERT Performance
entry.content:
Dear HANA Experts,

i am considering converting some VARBINARY Columns to Hybrid LOB and i am curious on the performance impact for WRITE operations. For READ it is clear to me that all LOB Data bigger some threshold (>1KB in default) is stored on Disk. So there is some I/O overhead for this.

But for the WRITE Performance, i am not sure: is there some additionally WRITE I/O for INSERT/UPSERT necessary, besides the usual sync. commit on LOG disk? is for Hybrid LOB delta store in use? 

My concern originates from SAP note 2000002, point 10: "Increased runtime of INSERT operation on table with hybrid LOB field" -> "INSERTs in hybrid LOBs have to perform disk I/O if the configured memory threshold is exceeded and the data is stored in a disk LOB."

I hope some Experts here in the HANA community can help me with this.

Thank you very much

BR Dominik

entry.title: Fetching Tax Categories from Sales org in sap mdg BP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the MDG for BP.

We use Class CL_MDG_BS_ECC_BP_CHECK_SERVICE of method DFLT_TAX_IND_READ_BY_VKORG to fetch the tax categories based on multiple Sales org.

Noticed that this method holds multiple nested loop with multiple select queries.

Is there any alternate SAP NOTE or a different class to achieve the same.

noticed that 2795026 note is already in place.

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Clarification on reverse implementation of S4HANA from R4 to R2
entry.content:
Dear Experts, kindly guide on a customer merger situation wherein both are on SAP HANA. However, due to merger they need to bring one of the version down from R4 to R2 so that they have one consistent platform. Please advise how to move forward?

Please advise if you have encountered similar situation, and can share the approach /guidelines/tools/techniques to handle the customer merger situation.

Thanks in advance, look forward to hearing back.

entry.title: Is it possible to reset Cumulative Received Quantities in Schedule Agreement Items every X time?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am currently analyzing a requirement with my client in order to reset Cumulative Quantities received for a specific item in a Schedule Agreement from Vendors. 

So far, I am not able to find any "**bleep**. GR Qty" anywhere in the Schedule Lines but only the "**bleep**. Sch. Qty" and the "GR Qty" specific for one delivery schedule. 

1. Is there any field available to identify the cumulative received quantity? If not, I understand we would need to calculate this based on the GR Qtities for an item, right?

2. If a valid field can be used for this, is it possible to reset it every period of time as we would do for the Agreed Cumulative Qty or is that something that can only be done for Agree Qtities?

Based on your knowlegde, I might probably need to start using the field "Agreed Cumulative Quantity" so this should be defined before it is reset as of 0 for the next period of time. Since I have never worked with this, I have an additional question:

3. By using ME88, are we only resetting this field or are we resetting actually the Cumulative Qty?

 

Thanks a lot for your inputs!!!

entry.title: Purchase order Release strategy's status is wrong in ME23N
entry.content:
The purchase order workflow is completed, and all the approvers are approved. The PO has been released but is still in ME23N, and the status of the Release strategy is pending in the header details. 
In the workflow log, there is no error, and all the tasks are executed perfectly, what is the root cause for this behavior in the s4 Hana system, and how to resolve this?

entry.title: Goods issue in S/4 without using EWM for delivery note printout
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using S/4 2022. I just want to confirm.

Delivery note cannot be printed without doing a goods issue in outbound delivery? is my assumption correct?

entry.title: How to make a acuired SAC model 24 months rolling
entry.content:
Hi,

I have made a model in SAC which is getting updated every day from a sap hana database.
Now I want to have it in such a way that it always has the current months and past 23 months. But I don't know how to make this. I can filter on the year, such that I only have 2024 and 2025. But I want to have it that I have now feb 2023 to jan 2025 included and next month march 2023 till feb 2025. Is this possible?

Also when I want to add something to a model later on it says:

"The query selection cannot be changed"

I want to change a attribute of a column to textual but this is not allowed. Are you not allowed to change a model once it is made?

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Creation of condition records not possible in Scheduling Agreement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

When I'm trying to create conditions for new velidity period for existing SA, update gets canceled. When change is made in ME32L with new validity period (01.01.2025-31.12.2025 with reference to previous one 01.01.2024-31.12.2024) I get info that change was saved. However changes are not visable at all and after a moment I get notification that update was canceled:

Doc type is YIC. It seems that I have a deadlock on some processes:

Do you have any idea on how to handle that case so these new prices can be updated?

Many thanks!

entry.title: Calculation View Input Parameter Order Not Respected in Analysis for Office
entry.content:
Hi,

In my Calculation View, I have three input parameters: Start date, End date, and plant. However, when I execute it in Analysis for Office, the parameters appear in a different order—first end date, then plant, and finally start date. I have already tried adjusting the order in the Calculation View, and while it works correctly there, the sequence remains unchanged in Analysis for Office.

I would like to know if there is a way to control the order of parameters when running a Calculation View directly in Analysis for Office.

Thanks.

entry.title: Issue with HANA Cloud Instance in BTP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are experiencing issues with our HANA Cloud instance in BTP today.

We attempted to start the HANA instance using SAP HANA Cloud Central, but we are unable to start it at the moment.

Has anyone else faced a similar issue? Any insights or workarounds would be appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Print file zebra with SAP
entry.content:
How to print a .prn file (or .zpl Zebra) with abap SAP (smartforms, adobeform, etc..)?

Help me

entry.title: PR is getting changed
entry.content:
It has been observed that the PR is getting changed even if PR is released, User can edit the text in the Header or can delete the PR even if the PR is in release mode & even after PO made.

We need to create new role for below requirement. Kindly help to solve this PR/PO release , how we can restrict users for this.

  1. If Any PR  (Purchase Requisition) gets released at all 3 level, it should not be edited by first 2 approvers unless the third approver unreleases it.
  2. If PO (Purchase Order) is made using the same PR, none of all 3 PR approvers should make changes in it, whose PO is made.
  3. If PO is released at all 3 level, then also the same PR should not be edited by anyone.

entry.title: Extend Odata service for fiori app - Pick Outbound Delivery to include delivery with batches
entry.content:
I have a requirement to extend standard fiori app - Pick Outbound Delivery, in Odata service , there is a method DELIVERYHEADER_GET_ENTITY which has a logic to exclude deliveries with batches as per standard SAP code, now Can i enhance this odata service? I am unable to find business context for this app to enhance this app via Custom fields and logic (App Extensibility: Pick Outbound Delivery | SAP Help Portal) , please provide help.

Odata service - LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PICK

UI5 application - LE_SHP_PICKS1

entry.title: HANA XSA Fiori-Elements
entry.content:
Hi,

we would like to implement Fiori Elements apps in the WebIDE (SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08 XSA). Currently, only the Fiori List Report template is available, and it requires a v2 OData service as a basis, which is surprising since Fiori Elements was actually designed for OData v4. Will the other templates be integrated in future releases, and will they support the v4 version accordingly?

Br,

Michael

entry.title: HANA SQL QUERY TO FETCH NESTED JSON OBJECTS
entry.content:
hi ,

I have a table machine_group with values as shown.

 

Now using a query as show below

select * from machine_group for json

the values fetched as below 

[
  {"COLA" :"A","COLB":"VAL1"},{"COLA" :"A","COLB":"VAL2"},{"COLA" :"A","COLB":"VAL3"},
  {"COLA" :"B","COLB":"VAL5"},{"COLA" :"B","COLB":"VAL6"},{"COLA" :"B","COLB":"VAL7"}
 ]

But am looking to fetch the output in nested json format as shown below.

 
[
{
"COLA":"A",
"COLB":[ {"COLB":"VAL1"}, {"COLB":"VAL2"}, {"COLB":"VAL3"}]
},
{
"COLA":"B",
"COLB":[ {"COLB":"VAL4"}, {"COLB":"VAL5"}, {"COLB":"VAL6"}]
}
]

 

Please help me. 

Regards

Govardan

entry.title: I am getting problem Value is not applied during RFQ creation
entry.content:
During RFQ creation 

When I try to put Supplier address 

Then its shows Value is not applied.

Message No. DH864

entry.title: How to terminate transaction causing high CPU Utilization in SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Is there any way to terminate/cancel the transaction causing 100% CPU for more than 5-10 min?

Is it possible to apply any specific condition on the HANA database layer/ application layer?

Or is there any other way to achieve this?

Please let me know!

Thanks,
Shruti

entry.title: UB document that does not record consumption
entry.content: We use UB purchase orders to move items from hubs to spokes. When those go materials go to other plants that are not designated replenishment paths, we want SAP to ignore the consumption all together in the corrected total, not just record it in unplanned consumption. We are overbuying due to operational issues and need to see if a customized version of UB purchase orders can ignore all consumption records for forecasting in the plant that sent the material. Is there a way to do this, and would the Consumption field KZVBR in EKPO be the field or setting that drives that?

entry.title: Does SAP HANA graph have gremlin query support? If yes , is there any documentation for the same?
entry.content:
I am evaluating various options for querying graph data in sap hana db.  Although SAP HANA supports Cypher query, is there a support for connection and data fetch using gremlin.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: BTP application writing to on-premise HANA database table / Datasphere HANA database table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some BTP developers creating an app that would write to an on-premise HANA database table (this database is used in for BW/4HANA).

We eventually want to migrate the BTP app to write to a Datasphere table. 

Is there a connection framework where we can easily switch the BTP app from writing to the on-premise HANA database table to writing to the Datasphere table?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin
